ListSecurityGroups.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListSecurityGroups.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000. Default is 1000
ListSecurityGroups.instanceId: Instance ID, used to query security groups associated with the instance
ListSecurityGroups.vpcId: VPC instance ID, used to query security groups associated with the VPC
ListSecurityGroups.securityGroupId: Security group ID, for exact query of a single security group
ListSecurityGroups.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs, for batch query of multiple security groups
